items.title: Association of White Matter Hyperintensities, Regional Brain Glucose Metabolism, and Cognitive Impairment in Aβ-Negative Patients.
items.abstract: Periventricular white matter hyperintensities (PWMHs) and regional brain glucose hypometabolism have each been linked to cognitive impairment, but their interplay independent of β-amyloid (Aβ) is unclear. This study examines whether PWMHs relate to region-specific cortical hypometabolism and metabolism mediates domain-specific cognition in Aβ-negative individuals. This retrospective cross-sectional study included 141 Aβ-negative patients with mild cognitive impairment (MCI) older than 50 years and 83 normal controls (NCs). All participants underwent  The MCI and NC groups did not differ in age or sex. Greater PWMH burden correlated with lower FDG uptake, strongest in the posterior cingulate cortex (PCC) (β = -0.14; 95% CI -0.20 to -0.09;  The effect of PWMHs on executive dysfunction was mediated by cortical hypometabolism, whereas memory dysfunction was directly driven by PWMHs. These findings suggest that incorporating
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳の周囲白質高信号（PWMHs）と特定脳領域のグルコース代謝低下は認知障害と関連するが、β-アミロイド（Aβ）陰性患者における両者の関係は不明である。  
方法：50歳以上のAβ陰性軽度認知障害（MCI）患者141名と正常対照83名を対象に、PWMHsの負荷と脳の部位別グルコース代謝（FDG-PET）および認知機能の関連を後ろ向き横断研究で解析した。  
結果：PWMHsの負荷増加は後帯状皮質（PCC）を中心にFDG取り込みの低下と有意に関連した（β = -0.14）。PWMHsは実行機能障害に対しては皮質代謝低下を介して影響し、記憶障害には直接的に影響を及ぼした。  
結論：Aβ陰性患者において、PWMHsは特定脳領域の代謝低下を通じて認知機能障害に寄与し、実行機能と記憶障害で異なるメカニズムが示唆された。これらの知見は認知障害の病態理解と診断に有用である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、β-アミロイド陰性の軽度認知障害（MCI）患者141名と健常者83名を対象に、脳室周囲白質高信号（PWMHs）と領域特異的な脳のグルコース代謝低下、および認知機能障害の関連を検討した。PWMHsの増加は後帯状皮質の代謝低下と強く関連し、実行機能障害は代謝低下を介して影響を受ける一方、記憶障害はPWMHsの直接的影響によることが示された。

items.title: Occupational Exposure to Industrial Dust and Rates of Multiple Sclerosis.
items.abstract: Exposure to lung irritants such as smoking and organic solvents has been associated with increased risk of multiple sclerosis (MS), particularly among genetically susceptible individuals. The aim of this study was to investigate the association between occupational exposure to industrial dust and MS and to assess potential interactions with smoking and  We conducted a Swedish population-based case-control study. Patients with incident MS age 16-70 years were consecutively identified by neurologists at 40 clinics (2005-2015). Eligibility criteria for participants were age 16-70 years, residence in Sweden, and a neurologist-confirmed diagnosis of MS according to the McDonald criteria. Controls without MS were randomly sampled from the national population register using density sampling and frequency-matched to cases on age, sex, and residential area. Occupational dust exposure was assessed using questionnaire data. Logistic regression was used to estimate odds ratios (ORs) and 95% CIs. Additive interactions between dust exposure and smoking and between dust exposure and  The analytic sample included 2,070 participants and 2,899 controls. The mean age at index was 34.4 years for participants and 35.4 years for controls. Women comprised 72.5% of participants and 75.1% of controls. Industrial dust exposure was associated with increased rate of MS (OR 1.30, 95% CI 1.05-1.63), with a dose-response relationship with duration (OR per 1-year exposure 1.03, 95% CI 1.00-1.06). Evidence of additive interactions was observed between dust exposure and smoking (AP 0.32, 95% CI 0.03-0.62) and between dust exposure and  Occupational dust exposure was associated with increased rate of MS, particularly in combination with smoking and HLA-DRB1*15:01, suggesting joint effects of occupational, environmental, and genetic risk factors. The reliance on self-reported occupational histories and potential residual confounding are important limitations. Further studies are warranted to clarify underlying mechanisms and to inform preventive strategies.
items.summary_ja:
背景：喫煙や有機溶剤などの肺刺激物への曝露は、多発性硬化症（MS）のリスク増加と関連し、特に遺伝的感受性を持つ個人で顕著である。本研究は、職業的な工業粉塵曝露とMSの関連性、および喫煙や遺伝子型（HLA-DRB1*15:01）との相互作用を検討することを目的とした。

方法：スウェーデンの16～70歳の新規MS患者2,070名と対照2,899名を対象に、40の神経科クリニックで2005～2015年に症例対照研究を実施。職業歴は質問票で評価し、ロジスティック回帰でオッズ比（OR）を算出。曝露と喫煙・遺伝子型の加法的相互作用も解析した。

結果：工業粉塵曝露はMS発症率の増加と関連（OR 1.30、95%CI 1.05-1.63）し、曝露期間の延長に伴う用量反応関係も認められた。粉塵曝露と喫煙（AP 0.32、95%CI 0.03-0.62）、および粉塵曝露とHLA-DRB1*15:01の間に加法的相互作用が示された。

結論：職業的工業粉塵曝露はMSリスクを高め、特に喫煙や遺伝的素因と組み合わさることでリスクが増大する可能性が示唆された。自己申告による曝露評価や残存交絡の可能性が限界であり、今後の研究でメカニズム解明と予防策の検討が求められる。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究はスウェーデンの症例対照研究により、職業的な工業粉塵曝露が多発性硬化症（MS）の発症率増加と関連し、曝露期間の長さに比例することを示した。特に喫煙および遺伝的リスク因子HLA-DRB1*15:01との相互作用が認められ、職業的・環境的・遺伝的要因の複合的影響が示唆された。ただし自己申告による曝露評価や交絡因子の影響に限界があり、さらなる研究が必要である。

items.title: Circulating Biomarkers of Neurodegeneration and All-Cause and Dementia-Specific Mortality.
items.abstract: Blood-based biomarkers offer a widely available, scalable, and noninvasive method to study neurodegeneration. However, the association between blood-based biomarkers of neurodegeneration and long-term risk of mortality, as well as dementia-specific mortality in a racially diverse cohort, remains understudied. The goal of this study was to determine whether baseline biomarkers of neurodegeneration are associated with long-term risk of all-cause and dementia-specific mortality in a biracial cohort. The REasons for Geographic and Racial Differences in Stroke cohort study enrolled 30,239 Black and White participants across the continental United States from 2003 to 2007, with ongoing follow-up. Plasma neurofilament light chain (NfL), total tau, glial fibrillary acidic protein (GFAP), and ubiquitin carboxy-terminal hydrolase L1 (UCH-L1) were measured in baseline plasma from a random sample of participants. All-cause mortality, dementia-specific mortality, cardiovascular-specific mortality, and other causes of death were adjudicated and classified using medical records, the Social Security Death Index, and the National Death Index. Cause-specific Cox regression models accounting for competing risks were used to calculate hazard ratios (HRs) of outcomes for each biomarker separately. A total of 917 participants had a mean baseline age of 67.4 years (SD 12.1), 49.4% were female, and 48.6% self-identified as Black. With a mean follow-up of 11.1 (SD 5.7) years, 51.0% (477/935) of participants died and 9.2% experienced dementia-specific mortality (86/935). No associations were observed for total tau. In fully adjusted models for other biomarkers, HRs of all-cause mortality per standard deviation increments were 1.93 (95% CI 1.48-2.52) for GFAP, 1.90 (95% CI 1.55-2.32) for NfL, and 1.23 (95% CI 1.09-1.37) for UCH-L1. Furthermore, GFAP (HR 5.66, 95% CI 2.91-11.00) and NfL (HR 2.72, 95% CI 1.57-4.71) were associated with dementia-specific mortality in fully adjusted models. GFAP (HR 2.06, 95% CI 1.22-3.49) and NfL (HR 2.16, 95% CI 1.66-2.81) were also associated with cardiovascular-specific mortality in fully adjusted models. Plasma biomarkers of neurodegeneration, particularly GFAP and NfL, were associated with increased risk of all-cause, dementia-specific, and cardiovascular-specific mortality in a biracial cohort. These associations should be considered when assessing links between these biomarkers and other outcomes, as well as when used in clinical practice.
items.summary_ja:
背景：血液中の神経変性バイオマーカーは非侵襲的かつ広く利用可能な指標であるが、人種多様な集団における長期の全死亡および認知症特異的死亡との関連は十分に検討されていない。  
方法：米国の黒人・白人混合コホート（REasons for Geographic and Racial Differences in Stroke）から無作為抽出した917名（平均年齢67.4歳、約半数が黒人）を対象に、血漿中の神経変性マーカー（NfL、総タウ、GFAP、UCH-L1）を測定し、平均11.1年の追跡期間中の死亡リスクとの関連を競合リスクを考慮したCox回帰モデルで解析した。  
結果：総タウは死亡リスクと関連しなかったが、GFAP、NfL、UCH-L1は全死亡リスクと有意に関連した。特にGFAP（HR 5.66）とNfL（HR 2.72）は認知症特異的死亡リスクとも強く関連し、さらに心血管特異的死亡リスクとも関連が認められた。  
結論：血漿中の神経変性バイオマーカー、特にGFAPとNfLは、全死亡および認知症・心血管疾患による死亡リスクの増加と関連しており、これらのバイオマーカーを臨床や研究で用いる際にはこれらの関連性を考慮すべきである。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、血中の神経変性バイオマーカー（GFAP、NfL、UCH-L1）が、二つの人種グループを含むコホートにおいて、全死亡リスクおよび認知症特異的死亡リスクと関連するかを検証した。約11年の追跡で、GFAPとNfLは全死亡、認知症特異的死亡、心血管死亡のリスク上昇と有意に関連し、総タウは関連しなかった。これらのバイオマーカーは臨床評価や研究において重要な指標となる。

items.title: Prevalence and Relative Proportions of Multiple Sclerosis, Neuromyelitis Optica Spectrum Disorder, and Myelin Oligodendrocyte Glycoprotein Antibody-Associated Disease in the Republic of Korea.
items.abstract: To provide the clinically validated, nationwide estimates of multiple sclerosis (MS), neuromyelitis optica spectrum disorder (NMOSD), and myelin oligodendrocyte glycoprotein antibody-associated disease (MOGAD) in Korea, and to describe their relative proportions. From January to March 2025, 47 referral hospitals participating in a nationwide hospital-based registry identified actively followed patients with MS, NMOSD, or MOGAD. Diagnoses followed international criteria, and antibody status was confirmed using validated CBAs. Actively followed patients had ≥1 outpatient visit in the prior 6 months. Centers provided demographics, treatments, and Expanded Disability Status Scale. Prevalence used national population data. A total of 4,196 patients were identified, 1,799 MS, 1,616 NMOSD, and 781 MOGAD (ratio 2.3:2.1:1). Mean age at onset was 33.4 ± 12.0 years for MS, 42.7 ± 14.7 for NMOSD, and 41.7 ± 17.8 for MOGAD, and the female-to-male ratios were 2.2:1 for MS, 5.1:1 for NMOSD (6.5:1 in aquaporin-4-IgG positive cases), and 1.5:1 for MOGAD. Crude prevalence estimates were 3.48, 3.13, and 1.51 per 100,000, respectively. This nationwide registry demonstrates a distinctive Korean CNS inflammatory demyelinating disease profile, with a relatively higher proportion of NMOSD and MOGAD reflecting the low prevalence of MS in East Asia.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）、視神経脊髄炎スペクトラム障害（NMOSD）、およびミエリンオリゴデンドロサイト糖タンパク抗体関連疾患（MOGAD）は中枢神経系の炎症性脱髄疾患であり、その国内有病率と相対的割合は地域差が大きい。  
方法：2025年1～3月に韓国全国の47の紹介病院が参加する病院ベースの登録システムを用い、国際基準に基づく診断と抗体検査（CBAs）で確定したMS、NMOSD、MOGAD患者を抽出。直近6か月以内に外来受診歴のある患者を対象とし、人口統計、治療内容、障害度（EDSS）を収集。国勢データを用いて有病率を算出した。  
結果：計4,196例（MS 1,799例、NMOSD 1,616例、MOGAD 781例）が登録され、患者比は約2.3：2.1：1。発症年齢中央値はMSが33.4歳、NMOSDが42.7歳、MOGADが41.7歳。女性比はMSで2.2倍、NMOSDで5.1倍（抗アクアポリン4-IgG陽性例は6.5倍）、MOGADで1.5倍。粗有病率はMSが3.48、NMOSDが3.13、MOGADが1.51/10万人。  
結論：韓国における中枢神経炎症性脱髄疾患の特徴的な分布が示され、東アジアでMSの有病率が低い一方でNMOSDおよびMOGADの割合が相対的に高いことが明らかとなった。
items.summary_short_ja: 韓国における多発性硬化症（MS）、視神経脊髄炎スペクトラム障害（NMOSD）、ミエリンオリゴデンドロサイト糖タンパク抗体関連疾患（MOGAD）の全国的な有病率と比率を調査した。2025年初頭に47病院で4,196例を確認し、MSが1,799例、NMOSDが1,616例、MOGADが781例で比率は2.3:2.1:1。MSの発症平均年齢は33.4歳、NMOSDは42.7歳、MOGADは41.7歳。女性比率はNMOSDが特に高く、各疾患の有病率はそれぞれ3.48、3.13、1.51/10万人であった。東アジア特有の疾患分布を示す。

items.title: International Consensus on the Evaluation and Management of Hypothalamic Hamartomas: Results From a Modified Delphi Survey.
items.abstract: Hypothalamic hamartomas (HH) are rare brain lesions associated with epilepsy and numerous comorbidities. Worldwide treatment is varied. There is a paucity of high-quality evidence to guide treatment. This study aimed to establish expert consensus on the evaluation and management of HH. A modified Delphi survey was designed by the Medical Advisory Board of Hope for Hypothalamic Hamartomas and was conducted among 17 International League Against Epilepsy level II epilepsy surgery centers. The survey included 257 questions in round 1 and 81 refined questions in round 2, covering domains of diagnosis, imaging, medical and surgical treatment, neuropsychological and psychiatric evaluation, and care. Consensus was defined as ≥75% agreement using a 9-point Likert scale. Consensus was achieved on 82% of the questions. Key findings include the following: Diagnosis: Gelastic and dacrystic seizures are strongly associated with HH; 3T epilepsy protocol MRI is essential. Evaluation: Preoperative neuropsychological and endocrinologic assessments are important. Evaluation with further imaging (PET, SPECT, and magnetoencephalography) and intracranial EEG is not useful. Treatment: No consensus was achieved on first-line, second-line, or third-line antiseizure medications (ASMs). Surgical evaluation should begin at the start of the first ASM, with surgery recommended after failure of 2 ASMs. LITT is preferred for Delalande II and III HH. Postoperative care: MRI follow-up at 6-12 months recommended. Preoperative and postoperative cognitive, behavioral, psychosocial, and endocrinologic evaluations are emphasized. Domains: IQ, language, attention, executive function, academic achievement, adaptive function, and behavior (tantrums, rage, anxiety, and depression) are important. This Delphi process highlights an international consensus on aspects of HH management. Gelastic/dacrystic seizures are important at diagnosis. A 3T epilepsy protocol MRI is essential. Early epilepsy surgery evaluation is advised. Surgery should be pursued either by disconnective, ablative, or resective techniques. HH location, size, and surgical experience are essential for good outcomes. Postoperative MRI should be obtained 6-12 months and/or if ongoing seizures. Neuropsychological testing should be obtained at baseline, and 6-12 months postsurgically. Findings support a multidisciplinary, protocol-driven approach to optimize outcomes in patients with HH. Areas lacking consensus, such as specific endocrine testing and timing of certain interventions, warrant further research and standardization.
items.summary_ja:
背景：視床下部過誤腫（HH）はまれな脳病変で、てんかんや多様な合併症を伴い、治療法は世界的に統一されていない。高品質なエビデンスも不足している。  
方法：HHの評価と管理に関する国際的専門家の合意形成を目的に、Hope for Hypothalamic Hamartomasの医療諮問委員会が設計した修正デルファイ調査を、国際てんかん連盟レベルIIのてんかん手術センター17施設で実施。第1ラウンド257問、第2ラウンド81問の質問を用い、診断、画像診断、薬物・外科治療、神経心理・精神評価、ケアに関する意見を収集。合意は9段階リッカート尺度で75％以上の同意と定義。  
結果：82％の質問で合意形成。診断では笑い発作（gelastic）や泣き発作（dacrystic）がHHに強く関連し、3TてんかんプロトコルMRIが必須。術前の神経心理学的・内分泌学的評価が重要で、PETやSPECT、脳磁図、頭蓋内EEGは有用性が低い。抗てんかん薬の第一～三選択薬には合意なし。手術評価は最初の抗てんかん薬開始時から行い、2剤失敗後に手術を推奨。Delalande II・III型にはLITTが好ましい。術後は6～12か月のMRIフォローと認知・行動・内分泌評価を強調。  
結論：HH管理に関する国際的合意を示し、早期の外科評価と3T MRIの活用、多職種連携によるプロトコル化された治療が最適化に寄与する。内分泌検査や介入時期など未解決の課題は今後の研究が必要。
items.summary_short_ja: 視床下部過誤腫（HH）はてんかんや多様な合併症を伴う希少脳病変で、治療法は世界的に異なる。本研究は国際的専門家17施設による修正版デルファイ調査で評価・管理の合意形成を図った。診断には笑い発作や泣き発作が重要で、3TてんかんMRIが必須。手術評価は抗てんかん薬開始時から行い、2剤無効後に手術推奨。術後は6～12カ月MRIと認知・行動評価を実施し、多職種連携のプロトコル的管理が最適化に寄与する。

items.title: Early Clinical and EEG Association of Genotype and Outcome in Genetic Epilepsies: A Cohort Study and Hierarchical Clustering Analysis.
items.abstract: Genetic epilepsies include a broad spectrum of disorders caused by pathogenic variants in more than 1,000 genes. Their clinical expression is highly variable, making early phenotype-genotype interpretation challenging. Early seizure semiology and EEG features may offer clinically useful information for diagnostic orientation and management. The aim of this study was to characterize early clinical and EEG features in patients with genetic epilepsies, examine their associations with outcomes, and explore genotype-phenotype groupings through hierarchical clustering analysis (HCA). We conducted a retrospective study at Bambino Gesù Children's Hospital. Eligible participants carried pathogenic or likely pathogenic variants in epilepsy-related genes, identified through medical records and laboratory diagnostic logs. Clinical variables at seizure onset and EEG recordings performed within the first month of the initial seizure were extracted. Follow-up outcomes included seizure frequency, drug resistance, movement disorders, behavioral/autism spectrum disorder comorbidities, and developmental delay/intellectual disability (DD/ID). Associations between early features and outcomes were assessed using χ We included 277 patients (52.3% female; median age at last follow-up 8.1 years, range 0-40). Drug resistance occurred in 58.8% and severe DD/ID in 35.4% of patients. EEG data at onset were available for 107 individuals. Neonatal onset was associated with a higher rate of drug resistance (71.4%; odds ratio [OR] 2.0, 95% CI 1.05-3.77), movement disorders (60.7%; OR 3.7, 95% CI 2.02-6.82), and severe DD/ID (71.4%; OR 7.0, 95% CI 3.66-13.49). Slow EEG background activity and multifocal epileptiform discharges were associated with both drug resistance and severe DD/ID. HCA identified genotype-phenotype groupings, including clusters involving  Early clinical and EEG features showed meaningful associations with outcomes and mapped onto specific genetic etiologies. HCA revealed coherent genotype-phenotype clusters that may support early diagnostic reasoning. Limitations include the retrospective design and small numbers per gene, warranting larger multicenter studies for validation.
items.summary_ja:
背景：遺伝性てんかんは1,000以上の遺伝子の病的変異に起因し、臨床表現型が多様で早期の表現型と遺伝子型の解釈が困難である。発作の初期症状や脳波（EEG）所見が診断や治療方針に有用と考えられる。  
方法：バンビーノ・ジェズ小児病院で遺伝性てんかん患者277名（女性52.3%、追跡中央値8.1歳）を対象に、発作初期の臨床情報と初回発作後1か月以内のEEGデータ（107名分）を後ろ向きに収集。発作頻度、薬剤抵抗性、運動障害、自閉症スペクトラム障害合併、発達遅滞/知的障害（DD/ID）との関連を統計解析し、階層的クラスタリング分析（HCA）で遺伝子型と表現型の関連群を探索した。  
結果：薬剤抵抗性は58.8%、重度DD/IDは35.4%に認められた。新生児発症は薬剤抵抗性（71.4%、OR 2.0）、運動障害（60.7%、OR 3.7）、重度DD/ID（71.4%、OR 7.0）と有意に関連。遅延したEEG背景活動や多巣性棘波は薬剤抵抗性と重度DD/IDに関連した。HCAにより遺伝子型と臨床・EEG特徴の一貫したクラスターが同定された。  
結論：早期の臨床症状とEEG所見は予後と遺伝子型に有意な関連を示し、HCAは早期診断支援に有用な遺伝子型-表現型クラスターを明らかにした。後ろ向き単施設研究であり、遺伝子ごとの症例数が限られるため、多施設での大規模検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、遺伝性てんかん患者277名を対象に、発作初期の臨床症状と初回1か月以内の脳波所見を解析し、これらの特徴と治療抵抗性や発達障害などの転帰との関連を検討した。新生児発症や脳波の遅延背景活動、多巣性棘波は重症転帰と有意に関連し、階層的クラスタリング解析により遺伝子型と表現型の関連群が同定された。これにより早期診断や予後予測への応用が期待されるが、後ろ向き研究かつ遺伝子ごとの症例数が限られるため、さらなる大規模研究が必要である。

items.title: Incidence of Childhood Stroke and Association With Recent Infection: A Population-Based Study Using Linked Data.
items.abstract: There are limited population-based data on the incidence and risk factors for childhood stroke, including associations with recent infection and vaccination. Therefore, we aimed to determine (1) the incidence of childhood ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke and (2) associations between a recent infection or vaccination and the risk of childhood stroke. A population-based case-control study was undertaken using linked administrative data from 2017 to 2023 in Victoria, Australia. All residents, aged 28 days to <18 years, were included. Infections in the 60 days immediately before admission were ascertained using state-wide notifiable infections and hospital admissions data sets. Vaccinations in the 42 days immediately before admission were ascertained using the Australian Immunisation Register. Strokes were identified in state-wide hospital admissions and death registry databases. Each case of childhood stroke was matched with up to 5 nonstroke controls on age (1-year bands), sex, socioeconomic position, comorbidities, and year. Conditional logistic regression was used to examine associations between infection and vaccination with childhood stroke. Over the 7 years, 571 childhood strokes (60% ischemic; median age 8.2 years; 44% female patients) occurred among 9,881,934 person-years (5.8 events [95% CI 5.3-6.3] per 100,000 person-years). Two in 5 patients had evidence of an infection in the preceding 60 days, with lower respiratory infections (n = 74), sepsis (n = 67), upper respiratory tract infections (n = 63), meningitis/encephalitis (n = 40), gastrointestinal tract infections (n = 28), and urinary tract infections (n = 22) being the most common. Children with stroke (vs matched controls) were more likely to have had a recent infection (cases 41.9% vs controls 18.6%; adjusted odds ratio [aOR] 2.54, 95% CI 1.97-3.27). The magnitude of this association was greater for ischemic stroke (aOR 3.39, 95% CI 2.45-4.69) than hemorrhagic stroke (aOR 1.90, 95% CI 1.24-2.90). No significant association was detected between recent vaccination and childhood stroke (cases 4.2% vs controls 2.5%; aOR 1.69, 95% CI 0.92-3.09). We provide contemporary data on new cases of childhood stroke in Australia, using population-wide linked data. Having a recent infection doubled the risk of childhood stroke. We found no significant evidence of an association between vaccination and childhood stroke.
items.summary_ja: 本研究は、オーストラリア・ビクトリア州の人口ベースの連結データを用いて、2017年から2023年までの小児脳卒中の発生率と、直近の感染症や予防接種との関連を調査した。対象は28日から18歳未満の全住民で、感染症は入院前60日間、予防接種は42日間の記録から抽出した。571例の小児脳卒中（60％が虚血性、中央値年齢8.2歳）が9,881,934人年中に発生し、発生率は10万人年あたり5.8件であった。脳卒中患者の約42％が直近に感染症を有し、特に下気道感染や敗血症が多かった。感染歴のある子どもは、感染歴のない対照群に比べ脳卒中リスクが2.54倍（虚血性は3.39倍、出血性は1.90倍）高かった。一方、予防接種と脳卒中の関連は統計的に有意ではなかった。結論として、小児脳卒中のリスクは直近の感染症で増加するが、予防接種とは関連しないことが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: オーストラリア・ビクトリア州の2017～2023年のデータを用いた人口ベースの研究で、28日～18歳未満の小児脳卒中571例を解析。小児脳卒中の発生率は年間5.8/10万人で、発症前60日以内の感染歴がある患者は非発症者より有意に多く（41.9%対18.6%、調整オッズ比2.54）、特に虚血性脳卒中で強い関連が認められた。一方、直近のワクチン接種と脳卒中の関連は認められなかった。感染が小児脳卒中のリスク因子であることを示す重要な知見である。
